environment: deployed user app, deployed Render backend, SMTP delivery to a disposable test inbox
action: Temporarily set demo user ID 1 to the test inbox address and submit the password reset request from the deployed UI.

mail.subject: Link Town パスワード再設定のご案内

actual: The deployed UI displayed the sent confirmation and the SMTP email arrived in the external inbox.
note: The host portion of the URL contained in the received email is malformed, indicating a deployed frontend base URL configuration defect. The token itself was valid.
